name: Storm Clouds (Character Voice)
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Slightly lower, rumbly quality but NOT scary - this is a children's bedtime story. Multiple voices could be implied through slight resonance. Dismissive but not cruel - more like oblivious adults who don't realize they're being unkind. The laughter is casual, not malicious.
character_context: The big clouds who make impressive storms. They're not villains - they simply don't notice or value small things. Their dismissal of Luna ('Come back when you're bigger') isn't mean-spirited, just thoughtless. They represent the world that overlooks small kindnesses.
notes: Keep within soft register for bedtime - rumbly does NOT mean loud or threatening. Think distant thunder, not storm. One brief line only.
